question_text: Which of the following best explains why a person needs to eat food regularly throughout the day?

options.label: A
options.text: Food is needed to replace the chemical energy continuously used by the body for movement, heat production, and other processes

options.label: B
options.text: Food needs to be eaten regularly because the stomach can only hold a certain amount at one time

options.label: C
options.text: Eating regularly helps the body store more energy as fat for emergencies

options.label: D
options.text: Food is only needed to build muscles and bones, not for energy

explanation: The body continuously uses energy from food for vital processes like respiration, maintaining body temperature, and muscle activity. When energy stores are depleted, the body needs more food to replenish them. Options B, C, and D are either partially true but not the main reason or are incorrect.
